title: (BUG) delete_status not wrapped in transaction — partial deletes on crash
description: posting.rs delete_status (lines 1446-1467) issues 8 separate DELETE/UPDATE queries sequentially without a transaction. If the server crashes or the connection drops mid-sequence, the database is left in an inconsistent state: some child rows deleted but the post still present (or vice versa). This violates atomicity. The import path correctly uses `pool.begin()` / `tx.commit()`, but the delete path does not. Fix: wrap the entire cleanup sequence (lines 1446-1467) in a transaction.
